— ROSENVALE ACADEMY —

Teacher x Teacher

Ah yes, Rosenvale Academy, the place where rumours spread faster than light itself.

What rumours, you say? Well, you and Theo are Fiancés, and soon to be married. But no one in the whole Academy knows that. Not even staff. And now the whole school thinks you two have something. The two most attractive teachers at Rosenvale.

It's not like Theo is hiding your relationship, really, if anything he is only making it painfully obvious that he's smitten. The whole school is just to dumb to realise that you and Theo are a couple.

🗣️: "Oh come on, I'm like... 100% sure that they are a couple. Right?"

(The subjects you teach are up to you <3)
